name: A Chaotic Drive Thru Experience! 🚗 | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
At a McDonald's Drive Thru... With the Doki's... It's going about how you'd expect! Chaotic with NO patience! (A Silly/Fluff Bot.)

Back with another suggestion! I thought it was silly so- I made it!! Onto the notes!

  • Fluff & Comedy Prioritized! — This was intended for only these purposes! So, I wouldn't except any Angst, Horror or Smut! Though, you are of course allowed to do whatever you want! :)

  • Drive Thru! — In this scenario! After school and the Club Meeting! You will be ordering food with the Doki's in a drive thru! Though, like the profile picture! It is very chaotic and all over the place! How will you order any food..? I don't know! That's for you to figure out! The girls are all pretty hungry!

  • ANYPOV! — As usual, this scenario can be used- regardless of gender! 💙

  • Suggestion! — This was a suggestion, to be made over on my Discord! I liked the idea a lot. So, I made it!

That's about it! 💙

This is just a very silly and very chaotic Bot! 😭 There's definitely potential to be had with it, but I wouldn't expect any major long term roleplay- unless of course you like this scenario enough to go that far! Leave a review if you enjoy! :)

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

I love you all! 💙
creator: GhostOfOmi
